feature.name: JSON5 parse and loads
feature.description: Extract json5's parser-driven loads API as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: parse JSON5 objects, arrays, strings, numbers, booleans, and null
support unquoted keys, single-quoted strings, trailing commas, and comments
support hexadecimal and leading-plus numeric literals
raise ValueError with line/column context for malformed input

entanglement.description: JSON5 parsing depends on recursive-descent parser state, scope stack, memoization cache, and lib.py value materialization.
signals: loads bridges Parser output into Python values

output.signature: loads(s: str, *, allow_duplicate_keys: bool = True) -> object
